name: Mediterranean Roast Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the chicken and remove as much visible fat as possible. Drain well.
2. Place the breast side up on a large piece of heavy-duty aluminum foil in a baking dish or roasting pan.
3. Combine the rosemary, sage, salt, and pepper. Season the cavity of the bird with half of this mixture; reserve the rest to season the outside.
4. Mix the lemon juice and olive oil. Spoon 2 tbsp into the cavity; pour the remainder over the chicken.
5. Sprinkle the remaining herb mixture evenly over the chicken.
6. Bring the foil edges together and fold them over several times, closing tightly.
7. Place in a preheated oven set to 450 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour.
8. Remove from the oven and reduce heat to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
9. Open the foil wrapping and baste the chicken with pan juices.
10. Return to the oven and roast until the chicken is golden brown and fully cooked, about 15 to 30 minutes. The internal temperature should reach 185 degrees Fahrenheit, and the flesh should be no longer pink.
11. Remove the chicken to a platter for serving. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
